pi_items.source: Task description explicitly requires setting the target location to 'C:\PublishOutput'.
Task description explicitly states the project is named 'CalibrationChecker', which naturally produces 'CalibrationChecker.exe' on publish.

Task description requires publishing a 'large, standalone executable' (Self-contained, Produce single file). A threshold of 40MB is consistent with an untrimmed .NET self-contained single-file executable.
Task description explicitly requires setting the Target runtime to 'win-x64'.

privileged_info_summary: The task is synthetically defined. The target publish directory (C:\PublishOutput), project executable name (CalibrationChecker.exe), minimum size logic for a self-contained app (40MB), and runtime architecture (win-x64) are all explicitly defined in the task description instructions for publishing the console application.
